title: Anthropic and Google extract_system silently drop additional system messages
description:
## Severity
Trivial
## Dimension
error-handling
## Location
src/providers/anthropic.rs:22-34, src/providers/google.rs:79-91
## Violation
Both AnthropicAdapter::extract_system and GoogleAdapter::extract_system call iter().find(|m| m.role == system) which picks only the FIRST system message; subsequent system messages are silently dropped. For Parts content, image_url parts are dropped (filter_map p.text.clone). No warning emitted.
## Mandated refactor
Reject requests with multiple system messages or concatenate ALL system message texts with documented separators. Surface dropped non-text parts via warn log.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
